schema.description: Single-writer rebase queue for serializing cheap-agent PR merges (cheap-agent-fleet.mdc rule #4). Orchestrator (Opus, then Brain) is the only writer; cheap agents only enqueue. Studio dashboard surfaces depth + ETA via Brain freshness API.

entry.shared_files_with_head: list[str] (used to decide if can merge in parallel with current head per rule #4 exception)
